title: leucanthemum balsamita
intro: Leucanthemum balsamita, also known as Chamomile Balsamita or Balsam Button, is a plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae, that has been used for its medicinal and culinary properties for centuries. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. Leucanthemum balsamita has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, anxiety, and insomnia, due to its calming and soothing effects. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemum balsamita include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
